name: Pristina
description: Capital and largest city of Kosovo, known for its vibrant cultural scene and historical significance.

name: Gračanica Monastery
description: 14th-century Serbian Orthodox monastery, UNESCO World Heritage site with stunning Byzantine architecture.

name: Rugova Canyon
description: Spectacular canyon with dramatic limestone cliffs and pristine nature, perfect for hiking and climbing.

name: Peja
description: Historic city at the foot of the Accursed Mountains, gateway to Rugova Canyon.

name: Brezovica Ski Resort
description: Mountain resort offering excellent skiing in winter and hiking trails in summer.

name: Prizren
description: Cultural capital of Kosovo with Ottoman architecture, cobblestone streets, and the historic Sinan Pasha Mosque.

name: Gadime Cave
description: Underground limestone cave system with spectacular stalactites and stalagmites formations.

name: Visoki Dečani Monastery
description: Medieval Serbian Orthodox monastery famous for its preserved frescoes and architectural beauty.
